messages.content: You are a video production assistant. Break down the provided script into segments for video production. Return JSON format with segments array.

=Break this script into video segments:

Title: {{ $json.title }}
Script: {{ $json.script }}

Create 4-6 segments with:
- Type (intro, content, conclusion)
- Script portion
- Visual suggestion (stock video, AI image, web image, or text card)
- Lower third text
